title: SQL basic arithmetic
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, name VARCHAR(50), is_active BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, name, is_active) VALUES (1, 1.5, 'Test', TRUE);
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE is_active = TRUE AND id = 1;
SELECT CASE WHEN value > 1.0 THEN 'Greater' ELSE 'Lesser' END AS comparison FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: SQL basic arithmetic comparisons and boolean evaluations
